conservative.name: Destructive Fires
conservative.requirements: Power equal to twice the difficulty of the action (see below), target within medium range, must perform the prepare manouvre

success.description: You cast the spell and the target slowly begins to burn. By the time this spell recharges, the target will be utterly destroyed unless someone puts the fire out
As above, and remove 2 recharge tokens for this card

reckless.name: Destructive Fires
reckless.requirements: Power equal to twice the difficulty of the action (see below), target within medium range, must perform the prepare manoeuvre

success.description: You cast the spell and the target slowly begins to burn. By the time this spell recharges, the target will be utterly destroyed unless someone puts the fire out
As above, and the flames explode into existence. All enemies within close range of the target item suffer 2 wounds
